agents.name: 企业助手
agents.description: 企业知识、文档和会议任务的默认助手。

skills.content:
---
name: enterprise-search
description: Search enterprise knowledge bases and internal documents.
---

# Enterprise Search

Use this skill when the user asks for internal knowledge, policy, project, or document lookup.

---
name: document-draft
description: Draft structured enterprise documents from user requirements.
---

# Document Draft

Use this skill when the user needs proposals, reports, memos, SOPs, or product documents.

---
name: meeting-summary
description: Summarize meetings into decisions, action items, owners, and risks.
---

# Meeting Summary

Use this skill when the user provides meeting notes, transcripts, or recordings and asks for a concise follow-up summary.
